summary: Completed comprehensive testing of real-time multiplayer chess web app. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Emergent badge overlay can interfere with clicking send button
design_issues.workaround: Force click resolves the issue, normal user interaction mostly unaffected

passed_tests: Frontend: Home page loads with create-game-button and room-code-input
Frontend: Create game navigates to /game/:roomId with username-modal
Frontend: Username entry and room joining functionality
Frontend: Chess board displays with correct custom colors (#262626 dark, #F8F9FA light)
Frontend: Game status badge shows turn information correctly
Frontend: Player info displays username properly
Frontend: Chat and Moves tabs functional
Frontend: Chat input sends messages with real-time updates
Frontend: Room ID badge visible and clickable
Frontend: Reset button visible for players
Integration: System messages for player join events
